data.title: uShip aids military family on home makeover show by transporting treasured items, episode airs Aug 29, 2025.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, uShip, known for its efficient shipping services, is being recognized for its involvement in the latest episode of the popular home renovation show, Military Makeover with Montel®. The show is focused on renovating the homes of American military personnel. Airing on August 29, 2025, the episode highlights uShip's essential contribution in safeguarding and transporting valuable belongings of a military family during the home transformation. This season of the show emphasizes the importance of supporting and honoring U.S. military members.

data.title: Fed's preferred inflation gauge, PCE, hits highest level since February with a 2.9% year-over-year increase in core PCE index.
data.description: An inflation indicator closely monitored by the Federal Reserve has surged to its highest level since February, staying consistently above the 2% target and casting doubt on the timing of expected interest rate reductions by Jerome Powell. In July, the Personal Consumption Expenditures price index, a key inflation metric for the Fed, rose by 2.66% compared to the previous year, meeting Wall Street estimates. The U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis announced that on a monthly basis, the index increased by 0.2%, aligning with predictions. On the other hand, the core PCE index, which excludes volatile food and energy prices and is favored by the Fed, grew by 2.9% year-on-year, up from the 2.8% recorded in June, marking its highest level since February. The monthly core PCE also saw a substantial increase of 0.3%, mirroring the growth in June. These figures suggest that inflation remains persistent, creating a hurdle for policymakers in managing the economic landscape.

data.title: PCE inflation data shows stability post Fed rate cut shift. Key test after Powell's Jackson Hole speech.
data.description: This marks the initial significant data release following Powell's unexpected announcement at Jackson Hole. The latest post-consumer expenditure inflation data has been scrutinized as an indicator of the Federal Reserve's shift towards potential rate cuts. For comprehensive coverage, stay updated with the latest developments.
